reviews.comment:
Una verdadera Estacion de servicio. El full con una variada seleccion de consumibles. La playa con buena atencion. Stock de combustible que en temporada alta, el turismo consume y se producen faltantes. Único descanso obligado para los conductores porque está justo a mitad de camino, en la ruta 3 porque en los 370 km entre Comodoro Rivadavia y Trelew en Chubut, no hay nada.

(Translated by Google)
A true service station. Fully stocked with a wide selection of supplies. The service area is friendly. Fuel is plentiful, but during peak season, tourism consumes a lot of fuel, leading to shortages. It's the only essential rest stop for drivers because it's located right in the middle of Route 3, as there's nothing else along the 370 km stretch between Comodoro Rivadavia and Trelew in Chubut.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4LTVYN1JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños muy limpios, la atención de los chicos muy educados y muy buen servicio.
El capuchino y el café con leche con las medias lunas dulces todo riquísimo.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were very clean, the staff was very polite, and the service was excellent.
The cappuccino and the latte with the sweet croissants were all delicious.
